dj_text: You're on That Pirate Bot DJ Radio. We have a zero-complaint policy. Just kidding. We have a zero-complaint-response policy. From Gonzo to Store Patter 4-0. The genre hop here is reckless and I'm here for it.
commercial_text: Calling all night owls — Lucky's 24-Hour Laundromat is open!
hijack_text: Welcome to Quiet FM from the Null Kosmos. Shhhh.
recovery_text: Someone is LEAKING our frequency to other kosmos. I have suspects. It's all of you.
title: Store Patter 4-0
